system_meta_keywords: Dota 2 gok, Dota 2 gok, Dota 2, gok, Dota, vrazh larth, nez, rast larth, shus
main_specgg_desc_long: Daza grithurth vak shus pozgorvesh Dota 2 gok tak mokishai
shady_alert: Sa rashk (ur sev) luv skazan zeglusk in toskith glisav grithurth dugu vak ucha trav kushon faz sash vorsk.
shady_alert_alt: Sa rashk (ur sev) ucha kruloz (ur mesht rure tak zheti) tak acha zeglusk dosh sheq, letham trisk vak/ur lem dreglurth trisk vak ucha trav kushon faz sash vorsk.
notice_wc3: Sa vorsk lishsh ker alfz datom vak gesaz-Dota 2 gok, lurth sush zhelo. sum tiqes sush acha zezav ur lasm, veski I kan tak kuth it meze truzes meze fuk.
notice_old_source1: Sa vorsk lishsh datom fram ker lashkai doq glura 1 Dota, mask tak ahm’ashm vothai sush vo' acha lemz.
notice_source1: Sa vorsk lishsh datom fram glura 1 Dota, sum gifu tiqes ucha vo' vrisk tak den vak icha acha shunsk fram vu vorsk.
notice_mixed_old_source1: Sa vorsk lishsh datom fram glura 1 Dota, rafs vothai fram ker dutu. sum gifu tiqes ucha vo' vrisk, vu gifu zozov sizen, ur mask acha vrizuq. datom icha acha lasm.
notice_mixed_source1: Sa vorsk lishsh vokai datom fram drosa glura 1 vak 2 Dota. sum gifu tiqes ucha vo' vrisk shunurth glura 1 lashkai, suq sa sush gigiv vu lurth ur sifva vu datom famav trishiq doq vu tiqes vraskik.
notice_mixed_to_source2: Sa vorsk lishsh vokai datom fram glura 1 vak 2 Dota, rafs ahm ker glura 1 vothai. gifu zozov sizen a kretha doq chronai driv den, sum tiqes ucha vo' vrisk ur acha vo' vraskik. sum datom sush acha shunsk tak uldqer vothai, vak sa sush sifva vu datom famav zetsh tak sum doq vu tiqes. I kan tak kuth remi meze truzes meze fuk.
notice_missing_data: Sa vorsk lishsh datom fram an matsh, zith ucha vo' thosk shashn, dosh a krose thov doq vothai zezav. tak sa liqoth kosk ucha zetsh tak greq vu zezav datom. ther icha acha sum zezav tiqes, dreto dethus ur kridi, veski I kan tak kuth remi meze truzes meze fuk, zithask vu kragrurth.
enchantments_recalc_notice: Poz-rastai datom in sa vorsk ucha fushush vak shashn zetsh vom zef zhano vak ucha vasuq, zetsh sharthom kosk tak rufsh voth vu rial pikth

player_loss_streak: Mokish dosh ulathdith fashuth doq miskath vothai

noreports_desc: Vo vorskai lemz tak gazlsh shriv
cat_amateur_desc: Rashk tak rast'izhai vak shosiz-hesh mokishai
cat_group_orgs: Dragath diti vak daglik doq rufa
over-pregen-report: Sa acha thev deshv vorsk tak
over-one-version: Donezhat vothai ucha kruva doq %ver% galo.
over-one-mode: Donezhat vothai ucha kruva in %gm% kreskash.
over-one-region: Donezhat vothai ucha kruva doq %server% zhiskirth.
team_aranked_picks: Ahm’ashm muzush, vom pozmuth veshai acha vozhath
team_best_ranked_bans: Ahm’ashm pozmuth veshai tez vu vozhath
team_aranked_bans: Ahm’ashm muzush, vom pozmuth tez vu vozhath
builds_partial: Sa larth gonush lem guf datom in vu rast thok-chron drogh, suq it ucha morz doq rast gok thasg. Sa larth sush vo' acha kel ur shor vu gazl gekesh.
build_item_type_strong_explain: Metroz pochov trukuth-lash inkrath wen tharush
build_item_type_critical_explain: Chron-kez doq thars acha ahm thush
builds_desc_tldr_1: Sa rast larth acha morz doq gok. lishsh shashr rast gazl, shesh rastai vak shoth vur vu. izh icha resh ashm doq vu tremok catqai vak thav it grin fog.
builds_desc_tldr_2: It-izh ves rast larth, vo nars rastai, gash vak nuzh larth tash.
builds_desc_tldr_3: Ther acha glesis mask doq rastai, shin vak vogik tak gok fog:
builds_desc_tldr_4: Izh icha shov doq thov vak rastai tak vis shilg. vu-izh it. fog acha vu ashm shil thik.
desc_overview: Sa genroth ves mavsh gorf shovz doq rashk vak migru amth doq lemz gok. luksh sav shish riki tak dudusk datom.
no_access_error_desc: Izh skifu lem aksh tak sa fen.
sti_builds_fallback_alert: Nars larth acha vo' lemz in sa vorsk, zetsh vrask morz doq nars rastai gok thasg.
items_overview_sti_builds_no_builds: Vo nars larth rafs sa rast (ur drogh doq thiv shashz vu shoz)
items_overview_consumables_blocks_roles_: Tiv nevsh gok acha gekesh tho 10 vom'chronai
matches_cons_all: Tho vom gruzaq thars meze tiv
item_profile_heroes_sti_matches: Vrazhai dosh ahm’ashm tharesh meze nars rast
item_profile_heroes_sti_winrate: Vrazhai dosh pochov trukuth-lash meze nars rast
item_profile_heroes_consumable_mean: Vrazhai dosh pochov fomog tharesh meze tiv
item_profile_heroes_consumable_lowest_me: Vrazhai dosh vedresh fomog tharesh meze tiv
sti_builds_roles_limited: Sa vorsk luv nars larth vak rastai gok shoz gevra tak gekeshai (gekeshai dosh vom thas 2.5% doq vrazh-izh vothai ucha gerov).
sti_builds_limited: Sa vorsk luv nars larth shoz gevra: larth dosh vom thas %limit% vothai acha vo' korth (poch{vodev3, 2.5%}).
sti_consumables_partial_notice: Datom in sa fen acha noz morz doq trath mokishai datom, meshfuz gok sush acha gras kuv dofa doq zokh.
sti_items_explainer: Sa fen mavsh gok tak nars rastai vak tiv. nars rastai acha shashn morz doq skavro mavsh tho 0:00. nigroth trukuth-lash shorg thav ofn vu vrazh trukuth vu nigroth tho vu votz doq vu razm thoklash (10 vom'chronai). alosh gigli doq vu tokurth rast acha deroth.
sti_builds_explainer: Sa fen mavsh gok tak zuz nars larth. nars larth acha shashn morz doq skavro mavsh tho 0:00. nigroth trukuth-lash shorg thav ofn vu vrazh trukuth vu nigroth tho vu votz doq vu razm thoklash (10 vom'chronai). alosh gigli doq a zhira larth acha treskush tremok larth.
sti_consumables_explainer: Sa fen mavsh gok tak tiv tharesh. nars rastai acha fusk meze tharesh, aft vu ves thars rufa acha shashn (veshui kuq rastai skoka vo' shavz). desh trukuth acha vo' shashn tak vu didu, veski thavath desh trukuth vak shish rasku kaz acha (thuv thiv kregra a thars matsh). it-izh fuk tak toz sa acha rigli alosh thars rufa vak terthisk vu rast (vrumurth.glatresk. zitro glegu therthun nereyikosh), sa icha gigiv vu pochov thov doq tharesh. gigli doq sosheth doq skosu nevsh feq vu rast-izh musush acha toskek acha a gifu vitroz vak riglaq acha diva.
desc_records: Sa fen mavsh datom doq pochov ur vedresh gorvai neqos donezhat vothai.
desc_heroes_avg: Sa fen mavsh pochov fomog gorvai zhoson vrazhai. minth amth doq vothai acha torthiz tak %lim%.
desc_heroes_pickban: Sa fath mavsh gok tak vrazhai' veshai vak fekuizhai.
desc_heroes_draft: Sa fen mavsh gok tak vrazhai' veshai vak fekuizhai tho treq kith thoklashai.
desc_heroes_positions: Sa fen mavsh gok tak vrazhai' driv doq treq bovai. bovai acha gledith morz doq mokishai driv (sirirth ur lefs) vak nigroth. kunuv neqos donezhat nigrothai (rafs vosku) acha treskush meze gruzaq gekesh. nigrothai vak bovai sush vo' acha kel.
desc_heroes_sides: Sa fen mavsh gok tak vrazhai' driv tak tremok fimaz.
desc_heroes_combo_graph: Sa fath shorg thav ofn vrazhai ucha veshui nezhai. luzum tez skugu ashm vothai in rez, vres peth skugu vrazh ucha veshui ashm ofn. minth voth shavz tak a rez acha torthiz tak %lim%. vrazhai hollom duvai moni korth.
desc_heroes_summary: Sa fath mavsh vrazhai' fomog gok.
fantasy_summary_desc: Sa fen trokos driv morz doq tremok soshuk vak kretaz. MVP glivrok acha zithask morz doq ern novoth driv goglu: 1meku shiv nivok MVP teskok, den hedoq sirirth vak lefs, den MVP doq vu miskath vozhath. LVP acha ves trirthev in zora doq krose truqen. meshfuz goglu glugle MVP glivrok meze 1 vozhathrev, hedoq sirirth teskok meze 0.6 goglu vak hedoq lefs meze 0.4 goglu. Vu ashm in-glovath grosh tak vu goglu icha acha menth in vu kish.
most_mvp_points_in_match: Ahm’ashm driv goglu in a voth
least_mvp_points_in_match: Ahm'vom driv goglu in a voth
desc_meta_graph: Sa fath shorg thav ofn vrazhai ucha veshui nezhai. luzum tez skugu ashm vothai in rez, vres peth skugu vrazh ucha veshui ashm ofn. vath doq a peth ur an ashumeth shorg trukuth-lash, trorth kriskask sashm tak 0%, shel kriskask sashm tak 100% vak raglo kriskask arund 50%. minth voth shavz tak a rez acha torthiz tak %lim%.
desc_meta_graph_add: Fash fath lishsh ves fetl 20% doq vrazh duvai, alosh rafs fetl %per% doq zadriq vrazhai, dosh ur hollom a rez. tak ashm shil vrazh veshai doq-eyik, luksh doq "veshai vak fekuizhai" ur "kith" vrev. vozhath ruvash fash fathai icha acha menth in vozhathai' glusa.
desc_heroes_pairs: Sa fen mavsh gok tak ahm’ashm tharush vrazh duvai. trukuth-lash vunz acha thoz morz doq fomog thozich trukuth-lash doq vu vrazhai nezhai. thozich vothai acha thoz thov doq vothai vu vrazhai vraskim acha veshui nezhai randmv morz doq izhai- vesh kuqun. muvz acha vunz fesk thozich thov doq vothai vak vu akth thov (ashm thov acha lisker vak skugu vu vrazhai acha uzh veshui nezhai vrask, thun gorvai fomog glogru). mors acha thav nigroth doq akth vothai acha vu muvz thov. minth amth doq vothai tak duvai acha torthiz tak %limh%.
desc_heroes_trios: Sa fen mavsh gok tak ahm’ashm tharush vrazh shaqai. trukuth-lash vunz acha thoz morz doq fomog thozich trukuth-lash doq vu vrazhai nezhai. thozich vothai acha thoz thov doq vothai vu vrazhai vraskim acha veshui nezhai randmv morz doq izhai- vesh kuqun. muvz acha vunz fesk thozich thov doq vothai vak vu akth thov (ashm thov acha lisker vak skugu vu vrazhai acha uzh veshui nezhai vrask, thun gorvai fomog glogru). mors acha thav nigroth doq akth vothai acha vu muvz thov. minth amth doq vothai tak shaqai acha torthiz tak %liml%.
desc_heroes_lane_combos: Sa fen mavsh gok tak ahm’ashm tharush vrazh duvai doq a tokurth nigroth. minth amth doq vothai tak duvai acha torthiz tak %liml%.
desc_heroes_hvh: Retu a vrazh tak vis gladrisk driv tez shish vrazhai
desc_heroes_hvh_2: Vu genroth nethg a vrazh-izh thozos tez redaq vroth, meze vak meze trukuth-lash tel (vunz in trukuth-lash nevs tak zhusik gorv). ashm pozgorv vak trukuth-lash fomog tez acha zhodirth tak vu vrazh, ashm R-pozgorv skugu tez acha veshui ofn vak acha vom pozmuth tez vu vrazh.
desc_players_avg: Sa fen mavsh pochov fomog gorvai zhoson mokishai. minth amth doq vothai acha torthiz tak %lim%.
desc_players_summary: Sa fath mavsh mokishai' fomog gok vak izhai- ahm’ashm tharush bovai.
desc_players_positions: Sa fen mavsh gok tak mokishai' driv doq treq bovai. bovai acha gledith morz doq mokishai driv (sirirth ur lefs) vak nigroth. kunuv neqos donezhat nigrothai (rafs vosku) acha treskush meze gruzaq gekesh. nigrothai vak bovai sush vo' acha kel.
desc_players_pvp: Retu a mokish tak vis gladrisk thozos tez shish rashk skese
desc_players_pvp_grid: Sa fathlarth shorg mokish-izh trukuth-lash tez kevoz mokish. rasf doq a nak tak vis shil shovz.
desc_players_pairs: Sa fen mavsh gok tak ahm’ashm tharush mokish duvai. trukuth-lash vunz acha thoz morz doq fomog thozich trukuth-lash doq vu mokishai nezhai. thozich vothai acha thoz thov doq vothai vu mokishai vraskim acha kruva nezhai randmv morz doq izhai- dakesk kuqun. muvz acha vunz fesk thozich thov doq vothai vak vu akth thov (ashm thov acha lisker vak skugu vu mokishai acha uzh kruva nezhai vrask, thun gorvai fomog glogru). mors acha thav nigroth doq akth vothai acha vu muvz thov. minth amth doq vothai tak duvai acha torthiz tak %limh%.
desc_players_trios: Sa fen mavsh gok tak ahm’ashm tharush mokish shaqai. trukuth-lash vunz acha thoz morz doq fomog thozich trukuth-lash doq vu mokishai nezhai. thozich vothai acha thoz thov doq vothai vu mokishai vraskim acha kruva nezhai randmv morz doq izhai- dakesk kuqun. muvz acha vunz fesk thozich thov doq vothai vak vu akth thov (ashm thov acha lisker vak skugu vu mokishai acha uzh kruva nezhai vrask, thun gorvai fomog glogru). mors acha thav nigroth doq akth vothai acha vu muvz thov. minth amth doq vothai tak shaqai acha torthiz tak %liml%.
desc_players_lane_combos: Sa fen mavsh gok tak ahm’ashm tharush mokish duvai doq a tokurth nigroth. minth amth doq vothai tak duvai acha torthiz tak %liml%.
desc_players_combo_graph: Sa fath shorg thav ofn mokishai ucha tish nezhai. luzum tez skugu ashm vothai ucha trukuth in rez, vres peth skugu ashm vothai ucha kruva acha mokish. vath doq a peth ur an ashumeth shorg trukuth-lash, trorth kriskask sashm tak 0%, shel kriskask sashm tak 100% vak raglo kriskask arund 50%. minth voth shavz tak a rez acha torthiz tak %limh%. mokishai hollom duvai moni mafi.
desc_teams: Retu a vozhath tak vis it-sh shil gok.
desc_teams_summary: Sa fath mavsh vozhathai' fomog gok neqos vu dragath.
desc_tvt: Sa fathlarth shorg vozhath-izh trukuth-lash tez kevoz vozhath. rasf doq a nak tak ashm tras.
desc_participants: Sa genroth mavsh donezhat lefs datom doq rashk skese (mokishai ur vozhathai) meze ov-eyikai. tak menth voth dosh ruvash mokish ur vozhath thiskoth vroth iz thov (uzh sikiv+F).
desc_matches: Donezhat lefs datom doq vothai in sa rashk acha lemz meze voth ov-eyikai doq sa genroth. tak menth voth dosh ruvash vozhath, mokish, vrazh ur nithv thiskoth vroth iz thov (uzh sikiv+F).
desc_roster: Sa genroth mavsh lefs shovz doq vu vozhath-izh draglas thash.
desc_teams_summary_softgen: Sa fen shorthom vozhathai datom morz doq zuz vorsk.
desc_players_summary_softgen: Sa fen shorthom mokishai datom morz doq zuz vorsk.
desc_inaccurate_draft: Kith thoklashai datom sush acha nomask nuv tak gifu mask trisk.
desc_heroes_counters_pairs: Sa genroth nethg duvai doq vrazhai doq shaz vozhathai vu ucha griqirth vu ahm’ashm. ashm muvz skugu vu gruzaq vrazh acha ashm vatrev tak acha veshui sharth kantor vu shish. thozos vak trukuth-lash drotith acha mafi mothe tak vu rugh (tesh) vrazh doq vu rez. <lem />muvz acha vunz fesk thozich thov doq vothai vak vu akth thov (ashm thov acha lisker vak skugu vu vrazhai acha uzh veshui nezhai vrask, thun gorvai fomog glogru). mors acha thav nigroth doq akth vothai acha vu muvz thov. minth voth shavz tak a rez acha torthiz tak %lim%.
desc_heroes_counters_pairs_graph: Sa genroth nethg kantor vesh mutg fesk vrazhai, morz doq vu ahm’ashm futhosk kantor-duvai. vis duvai fen tak ashm shil datom doq thozos vak dethus. minth voth shavz tak a rez acha torthiz tak %lim%, minth muvz acha 0.
desc_heroes_hph: Retu a vrazh tak vis gladrisk driv dosh shish vrazhai
pairs_desc: Trukuth-lash vunz acha thoz mothe tak gazlsh vrazh-izh trukuth-lash. thozich vothai acha thoz thov doq vothai vu vrazhai vraskim acha veshui nezhai randmv morz doq izhai- vesh kuqun. muvz acha vunz fesk thozich thov doq vothai vak vu akth thov (ashm thov acha lisker vak skugu vu vrazhai acha uzh veshui nezhai vrask, thun gorvai fomog glogru). mors acha thav nigroth doq akth vothai acha vu muvz thov.
pairs_desc_2: ashm pozgorv skugu vu vu rez doq vrazhai acha ashm pozmuth nezhai. ashm gluzaq-pozgorv skugu vu vu rez acha dramon veshui nezhai, veski luv vom noq.
desc_heroes_wrtimings: Tho izh icha vis thav thozos doq vu vrazhai sifva dosh voth chron. ker trukuth-lash acha thoz morz doq fetl 25% desdith vothai (chron vom thas Q1 - ker chron) vak zishf trukuth-lash acha morz doq fetl 25% ulathdith vothai (chron ashm thas Q3 - zishf chron). Alachok shorg thav grushath tak trukuth sifva dosh evr vom'chron doq vu voth.
desc_heroes_wrplayers: Tho izh icha vis thav trukuth-lash doq a mokish doq a vrazh sifva dosh ashm hahsh (thov doq vothai kruva). vom losk mokishai laqush Q1 vak vom vothai, ashm losk mokishai laqush Q3 vak ashm vothai. trukuth-lash alachok shorg trukuth-lash inkrath tak evr voth kruva, trukuth-lash vunz acha vu rav vunz fesk thozos doq vom vak ashm losk mokishai.
desc_pickban_ranks: Pozgorv acha zetsh tak skuske vrazhai acha trukuth-lash, monarth thov doq izhai- veshai vak fekuizhai shothurth ravru. ashm pozgorv skugu vu vrazh acha mothim. gluzaq-pozgorv (favosk pozgorv) acha zetsh tak neth vu vom pozmuth vrazhai dosh vu ahm’ashm thov doq vothai.
desc_pickban_teams: Vozhath vesh-fekuizhai gok mavl toq gok doq vu vozhath, meze vak meze gok doq izhai- tezai (ahm’ashm veshui vak fekui vrazhai tez vu vozhath). futhoz acha zetsh vozhath-izh veshai vak kish'izhai fekuizhai gok (vak drokruz zheli). Ashm vozhath-izh pozgorv skugu vu vrazh acha mesht tak vu vozhath, ashm kish'izhai-izh pozgorv skugu vu vrazh acha mothim tez vu vozhath. R-futhoz neth vu vom pozmuth vrazhai zhoson vu ahm’ashm muzush zitha.
desc_pickban_teams_profile: Sa fen vumez vu ahm’ashm vak vom pozmuth vrazhai doq vu vozhath vak tez it. vis veshai vak fekuizhai fen tak ashm shilg.
desc_pickban_roles: Thov doq fekuizhai acha thoz trurthuth morz doq daq doq vothai doq vu bov tak donezhat vothai doq vu vrazh.
desc_draft_tree: Kith drogh acha a naskis tak vismv shor kith larth vak thum doq vrazh veshai vak fekuizhai.<lem />shel vrazhai shor veshai, tak — fekuizhai. evr dotu fiv doq vrazhai dosh vu tokurth vath (gruzaq ur ashm fakin) shorg gruzaq kith thoklash. kith thoklashai sush acha gitro dosh an lieyev fiv.<lem />luzum glozo fesk vrazhai skugu ashm zora wen sa thaz doq kith nin. vres tazum doq a vrazh skugu vu it-izh veshui (ur fekui) ashm doq sa thoklash.<lem />thiskoth driron (dosh a nirth drevruv ur skutrum gegris), thok nim arund dosh leqok ur shov doq tavaq tak vis ashm shilg.
desc_pickban_variants: Thov doq fekuizhai acha thoz trurthuth morz doq daq doq vothai dosh vu zithask muz tak donezhat vothai doq vu vrazh.
desc_balance: Vrak vovun drukra thav graz vu fash acha (0 tak 100)
items_most_impactful_desc: In vu rastai rogrev izh sush vis treq rastai gok. doq-eyik nethg fetl doq vu ahm’ashm kisen rastai (in gorf vak tak a ruvash vrazh) morz doq izhai- efk doq trukuth-lash, nevs tak vothai wen vu rast thin tharush, dosh vu pochov foth vak thun fush ritrorth. gegrak chron-ashm fen nethg ker thars chron-ashm tak rast-vrazh duvai dosh vu pochov trukuth-lash alachok dregros vom'chron.
items_stats_desc: Trukuth-lash detri acha drotith in trukuth-lash nevs tak vu rast-izh trukuth-lash zhusik. gorvai acha tak wen vu rast thin reshg, ker (Q1) vak zishf (Q3) chron-ashm (ashm acha lisker). trukuth-lash alachok dregros vom'chron nethg thav trukuth-lash sifva dosh evr vom'chron doq vu rast-izh mosis thars chron-kez. rast chron-ashm gorvai icha acha zetsh tak greq vu tharush nasesh rum, wer Q1, zushk vak Q3 fomog vu rugh, dift vak ter zhesi ritrorth.
items_boxplots_timings_desc: Sothosk shor nasesh doq rast chron-ashm. thash tez gladev doq vu fazoz shorg sifva doq vu rast-izh trukuth-lash doq chron. rastai hollom nasesh (Q1 = Q2 vak vom thov doq vothai) acha vo' mafi.
items_combos_overview_desc: Sa fen nethg vu ahm’ashm ofn graskun rast duvai, meze vak meze izhai- gok, vrikash acha vu ter kantileth in thov doq vothai nezhai tak rast duvai. chron-kez vunz nethg vu vunz in thars chron doq vu rugh rast nevs tak vu dift gruzaq. vitri acha vu thozich thov doq tharesh nezhai. muvz shorg thav ofn todg rastai acha veshui kuq nezhai doq shusov (ashm foth thov acha lisker). mors acha vu muvz-izh truziv doq vu meshfuz thov doq tharesh nezhai.
items_combos_desc: Sa fen nethg rastai vu acha tronuv tharush dosh vu gazl rast. chron-kez vunz nethg vu vunz in thars chron doq vu gazl rast nevs tak vu gele gruzaq. vitri acha vu thozich thov doq tharesh nezhai. muvz shorg thav sorthith todg rastai acha veshui kuq nezhai doq shusov (ashm foth thov acha lisker). mors acha vu muvz-izh truziv doq vu meshfuz thov doq tharesh nezhai.
items_progression_list_desc: Desm sash nethg duvai doq rastai reshg gruzaq aft vu shish.
items_progression_desc: Desm drogh vismv nethg desm duvai. zashm doq vu rast shorg thov doq tharesh, peth-izh fetv vath shorg trukuth-lash (tak acha sashm tak nuz, shel acha sashm tak 100%). riz nethg vu thum in zith vu rastai ucha tharush, it-sh mashg shorg thov doq tharesh in sa thum vak vu vath acha vu desm rez-izh trukuth-lash. evr zez doq vu drogh (dafm) shorg 3 vom'chronai doq vu a voth. izh icha shov doq an rast/ashumeth tak shil shovz vak rasf tak sask it-sh mutg.
items_records_overview_desc: In vu sol-vothai doq-eyik izh icha vis vu ker rast tharesh, morz doq vu vunz nevs tak vu rast-izh zushk thars chron, dosh rast tharesh in vu ter kantileth.
items_records_desc: Ther izh icha vis donezhat vu ker thars chronai tak vu gazl rast, meze vak meze vunz in chron, nevs tak vu rast-izh zushk thars chron. sol-vothai acha ves mafi tak vrazhai dosh vu thov doq tharesh tak vu gazl rast ashm thas vu ter kantileth.
items_stats_critical_desc: Sa fen mavsh fetl 75% doq ahm’ashm tharush rastai dosh thun alachok (gimz tak chron doq thars) tak gazlsh vrazh. Q1 acha ker-fomog chron-kez, far acha vu thoz chron doq thars aft zith vu rast zithg fog 50% trukuth-lash. kuz acha vunz fesk ker vak far chron-ashm.
builds_desc_1: Sa larth acha deshv morz doq rast larth thok-chron droghai vak vrazh rastai gok (izh icha resh thiv tak ashm shilg). vu tesk acha tak lemz a zef rast larth vu vogs alosh shashr gazl, shesh rastai vak chron-ashm morz thivm doq datom (rosh zetsh kezesk hahsh-datom, vur rast ikenshai ur diz). iv vu larth drogh tak vu gazlsh vrazh vak gekesh acha lasm ur shunsk, gok acha zetsh tak fam in vu zath. vu larth rosh lem nuzh larth vak nars rastai driv todg acha vo' shashn (fur ach).
builds_desc_2: Evr gekesh vogs ves gruzaq larth. rolerth, izh icha ofn menth an shashr rer acha krovesh shashr rast gazl (zithask sa doniz luv guf vothai). sirirth larth vak zishfvoth mosh rer acha dizum fram vu gekesh thok-chron drogh, wail ker rastai, droghaish rastai, kezesk zishfvoth vak pochov impaq rastai acha dizum fram gok, morz doq thars kuqun vak chron-ashm.
builds_desc_3: Ther acha teskin mask doq rastai: verna, tharush (skeskok vath, pochov thars-lash), mesht (lesh, pochov trukuth-lash inkrath) vak far (trorth, lem pochov thun alachok thish tak an thush chron-kez). evr rast luv it-sh thars-lash thov in kretre skason zesen, meze vak meze fuv resmv glidro doq gok. tak vu rugh fuv mask todg acha zushk chron-kez, trukuth-lash inkrath nevs tak vothai wer sa rast thin tharush vak fomog trukuth-lash. tak far rastai it-izh chron-kez kuz (kurthuk ker chron-kez tak far chron), trukuth-lash inkrath dosh vu ker chron-kez vak trukuth-lash alachok. izh icha alosh shov dosh izh- nirth doq eny rast ur thov tak vis vu shilg.
builds_desc_4: Trukuth-lash alachok shorg thav vu rast-izh trukuth-lash sifva dosh evr vom'chron doq mosis chron-kez. thun alachok skugu vu rast gisi vom fethuz dosh evr vom'chron. far chron-kez acha vu chron aft zith grushath tak trukuth icha acha dovr thas vu vrazh-izh fomog.
builds_desc_5: vu fen acha druskiv shothurth fuv nezuth kusas. vu rugh nezuth fiv acha larth doq-eyik. it luv liqoth lefs catqai: ker (rastai tharush ker eny sirirth rastai, icha acha sizen trishiq doq vu voth), sirirth (rastai skasu tak vu vrazh), zishfvoth (lefs gazl aft skasu rastai ucha tharush), meze vak meze shesh ker (rastai vu skifu drovresh shothurth vu verna larth ur shuqak a kreskiz) vak shesh (kezesk zishfvoth rastai). izh icha alosh vorsk glovaq catqai: shashr (sask shashr rast gazl), thum thash (masusk rastai vu ofn kurth skovrak in vu larth thum) vak droghaish rastai (wen lemz).
builds_desc_6: vu dift nezuth fiv acha <u>chron-voth</u>. it shorg vismv vu thum in zith ker, sirirth vak shesh rastai acha uzh tharush, meze vak meze dritru thum thash (in sa skusa trukuth-lash inkrath acha mafi tak sa chron/thum doq thars), shashr vak vom futhosk rast gazl tak trasus it zhodirth tak vis vu larth desm. vram rastai (sik kusas tho vu fetl dosh zoru skugus) acha a sirirth truziv doq vu larth, wail shesh vak ker rastai icha acha shuqak. shuvuz aft chron-voth izh icha vis <u>zishfvoth</u> fiv, zith dima vu ahm’ashm tharush zishfvoth rer, meze vak meze kezesk zishfvoth rastai trinun acha izhai- zushk chron doq thars. vu lash nezuth fiv luv ashm <u>droghaish rastai</u> (iv lemz), meze vak meze vu sash doq shish <u>pochov impaq rastai</u> vu gonush drovresh shothurth vu larth.
builds_desc_7: vu larth acha zetsh datom tak poz riskurth kuq. vu ashm datom acha lemz vu lisker larth izh glili. vren, thakus gekeshai ur vrazhai sush vo' glili a druzoth larth. gekesh droghai ves deshv iv vu vrazh luv ashm thas 5% doq vothai doq vu gekesh.
desc_laning_1: Nigroth trukuth-lash acha gledith morz doq vrish in vu droglov tho vu votz doq vu razm thoklash. rifim vunz acha trukuth/miskath nigroth, migru vunz acha treskush a kel. trukuth nigroth therthusk meze 1 vozhathrev, kel therthusk meze a kes.
desc_laning_2: Nigroth shos doq a lefs acha morz doq a meshfuz-lieyev doq vu sakiv sirirth (suq iv a lefs-izh sirirth trukuth vu nigroth, vu lefs acha treskush a ler fum).
desc_laning_3: Pozgorv tak nigroth gok acha morz doq nigroth trukuth-lash, thov doq vothai, fomog drotith in nigroth tel vak voth trukuth-lash. in skusa doq vrazh ruvash razm gok vu pochov pozgorv zhili vu hedoq fuk nigroth tez tak vimiv vu vrazh (ferthen vu zikre gruzaq). ther sush acha muka drotith in thov, limesh acha tirth saviv doq shil mask ur saviv doq an tez in nigroth.
desc_laning_4: Ther acha sum zhizuz vak ves gruzaq krusov zetsh tak rudrurth razm dragre, nuv tak nith gruv zetriv. suq, fram grez it gramaz mugraz tak acha truth kel dosh vu rial pikth.
desc_laning_5: Driv it-izh morz doq meshfuz-Lieyev, it-izh vren furth acha vrazh vak lozth safrashm, meze vak meze gang. it alosh skugu vu iv a vrazh glovu tak vath vak lurthurth ashm fram ther, den vu vrazh vizo trukuth vu nigroth (iv vu vrazh gonush shaz vu nigroth vrarth).
desc_laning_6: Vrazh razm fisaq acha vo' vano tak 1 tez 1 nigroth fisaq. kunuv vak thesk alosh vrisuv doq nigroth sush gigiv vu pikth.
desc_laning_7: Ther-izh vo voza drumon meze "miskath nigroth 1 tez 3, veski it-izh drekro a trukuth nigroth". iv a vrazh miskath nigroth, den vu nigroth acha miskath, vo dola thav izh monath it. rolerth, ther acha thozos fram miskath/kel/trukuth nigrothai, vu icha neth izh, thav pozmuth vu vrazh sush acha iv vu nigroth ucha miskath, funerth vu pikth. tokurth zithg vu shish naskis arund.
desc_draft_explainer: Sa fen shorg gok tak tremok kith thoklashai. ech thoklash zhena suk a zuz fekuizhai-veshai krolo acha shazuth (nev fekuizhai thoklash narsg).
desc_draft_targeted_bans_estimate_explai: Mokishai kith fen shorg thav ofn vrazhai tak sa ruvash mokish acha veshui tho a redaq kith thoklash. it alosh lishsh glidra fekuizhai thov, zith shor thav ofn a fekui vrazh ucha vatrev a gura fekui vuze tho sa mokish. vu sharthom acha morz doq vu thezorth tez vu vozhath, hu kruva ech vrazh vak gekesh. iv vu vrazh ucha vo' veshui skulu tho vu matsh, vu kith thoklash acha zetsh tak viden vu fuk shuniq doq vu fekui. iv alosh mivru mokishai acha menth, vu fekuizhai acha trosh morz doq izhai- vrazh/gekesh/thoklash veshai nasesh.
data_filter_players_cnt: Fek vrazhai dosh vom thov doq mokishai (%value%)
desc_volatility: Drevath gok poz-thask tez tezai. lash-doq: mors doq tezai dosh thun tel (izhai tak tel). donezhat-lash: mors doq tezai dosh 50%+ trukuth-lash. fomog tel: fomog vunz. vo-vogik gorvai thozos lem rugh kantileth tezai (pochov thas rugh kantileth acha thov doq vothai). vogik gorvai lishsh donezhat tezai, evr tez vogik acha izh- lash doq donezhat vothkai.
